# Jackal AI

> AI voice receptionist for Australian trades and service businesses.

Jackal AI answers phone calls for trade businesses 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, using a natural-sounding Australian voice. When a tradie is on the tools — up a ladder, under a sink, on a roof — Jackal picks up, captures the job details, books it into the calendar, and sends an SMS summary.

Founded in Perth, WA, Australia in 2024. ABN 92 509 551 334.

## Products

### AI Voice Receptionist
- Plans from $249 AUD/month (no lock-in, month to month)
- Capture plan: $249/month + $1,500 one-time setup — for solo tradies and small crews
- Convert plan: $499/month + $2,750 one-time setup — for established businesses wanting lead qualification
- Command plan: $999/month + $4,500 one-time setup — for larger operations wanting a full admin replacement
- All plans include: 24/7 call answering in a natural Aussie voice, caller detail capture, job booking into calendar, SMS and email summaries
- AI receptionists go live in under a week
- Integrations: ServiceM8, Tradify, Simpro, Xero, MYOB, Google Calendar, GoHighLevel (GHL)

### Website Design for Australian Trades
- Custom-built, cinematic, conversion-focused websites for Australian trades
- Built in 30 days. No templates. No compromise.
- Engineered for Google rankings and AI search citation
- Quote on request — book a 30-minute discovery call

## Who we serve
Trade businesses and service companies across Australia: plumbers, electricians, builders, HVAC technicians, landscapers, cleaners, and other field service operators. Primary market: Perth, WA. Serves businesses nationally.

## Why it's different
Jackal AI was built by someone who spent a decade training real receptionists to handle trade business calls. The AI is configured to sound like a receptionist, not a bot — it asks the right questions, captures the right details, and books the job. Most callers do not realise they are speaking to an AI.

## Location
Perth, WA, Australia. Serves trade businesses nationally across Australia.

Jack Alexander — founded Jackal AI in 2024 after a decade training real receptionists for trade businesses and service operations. Based in Perth, WA, Australia.
